author: Andriy Babets
description: A timemap of your mind - turn your notes into an AI-powered interactive timeline. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Andriy Babets
manifest.description: A timemap of your mind. Epochgram turns your notes into an AI-powered interactive timeline.
manifest.name: Epochgram

name: Epochgram

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.20] - 2026-06-17
- Fixed lint warning issues across plugin.
- Improved popout window compatibility by using window/activeDocument-safe APIs.
- Updated production build/deploy script behavior and release metadata synchronization.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.19] - 2026-06-05
- Metadata-only patch release (version/changelog sync).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.18] - 2026-06-05
- Increased today distance indicator opacity for improved timeline visibility.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.17] - 2026-06-02
- Fix: AI bridge auto-start after Pro activation/validation when AI features are enabled.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.16] - 2026-05-31
- Drafts filter state: session-only (no persistence in data.json).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.15] - 2026-05-24
- Remove legacy compatibility shims; enforce canonical alias handling in search/bridge flows.
- Stop mirroring explicit topics to `epochgram-topics.json`.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.14] - 2026-05-21
- Timeline viewport: updated bounds to 1000...2100 years.
- Progress bar: updated wording.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.13] - 2026-05-20
- Updated README hero/content and examples.
- Stopped timeline inertia when collapsing sidebar on mobile swipe.
- Prevented timeline pan/scroll during dominant right-swipe collapse gestures on mobile.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.12] - 2026-05-20
- Fixed blinking state for AI summaries.
- Added more README examples.
- Added/updated tests.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.11] - 2026-05-19
- Fixed indexing for cached YAML dates and filename dates.
- Added support for full weekday names.
- Renamed Settings labels.
- Updated README.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.10] - 2026-05-18
- Fixed disappeared AI summaries after index refresh.
- Fixed Shift/Alt zoom anchoring and fallback behavior, including scroll-nav vs opened-record date handling.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.9] - 2026-05-18
- Added **Anchor by mdate** setting: use mtime instead of ctime as the anchor fallback for files with no filename date or YAML date property.
- Fixed hover right-column shift incorrectly triggering when hovering over a single-row record (no neighboring rows at the same Y position).
- Fixed `yamlDateProperty`, `yamlDescriptionProperty`, and `anchorMdate` settings not persisting across reloads.
- Updated AI feature descriptions ("using local Chrome AI" wording).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.8] - 2026-05-18
- Updated manifest and README.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.7] - 2026-05-18
- Settings UI: renamed frontmatter-related labels for clarity (Anchor date property, Summary property, Parse dates from other properties).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.6] - 2026-05-17
- Fix settings autofocus behaviour.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.5] - 2026-05-17
- Added **Record width limit (%)** setting to control when timeline rows collapse overflow into `(+n)`.
- Reworked settings layout into clearer sections.
- Updated summary rendering/measurement to respect record-width limits at runtime and tuned summary font zoom scaling.
- Improved mobile touch behavior: smoother inertia carry between swipes and right-swipe sidebar collapse handling.
- Improved interactions and README/docs wording.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.4] - 2026-05-17
- Fix mobile Epochgram opening in side panel leaf.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.3] - 2026-05-16
- Fixed auto-activating view if `Open timeline on startup` is on.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.2] - 2026-05-16
- Added handling for Ctrl/Cmd+Enter and Ctrl/Cmd+Click to open matched records in a new tab.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.1] - 2026-05-16
- Fixed timeline startup snap alignment so auto-open startup behavior matches manual open behavior.
- Updated plugin/runtime support paths related to trust/device and base64 handling.
- Refined README docs: updated download links and removed leftover comments.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.4.0] - 2026-05-16
- Reworked AI Bridge settings into YAML and improved summarization flow; added `Summarize current file` command.
- Added bridge and epochs fixes.
- Refactored review-related code paths.
- Fixed and cleaned up styles.
- Updated README.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.3.17] - 2026-05-14
- Add support for parsing ISO-like timestamps.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.3.16] - 2026-05-12
- Fixed `npm ci` dependency resolution conflict between Vite and esbuild.
- Synced manifest after local build updates.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.3.15] - 2026-05-12
- Fixed failed tests and build.
- Updated AI summary/epoch tests for constructor-safe `Notice` mocking and missing bridge stubs.
- Fixed modal lifecycle floating-promise lint issues in suggest modals.
- Added `package-lock.json` and refreshed dependency metadata.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.11] - 2026-05-12
- Replaced note-name toggle with `Filename length` word-based truncation (`0-12`) and updated rendering flow.
- Fixed filename truncation across languages/scripts (including Cyrillic, Greek, Arabic, Chinese, Japanese) and punctuation handling.
- Fixed cases where summaries equal/prepend filenames (including empty-content and tracked-change fallback paths) so truncation is applied consistently.
- Enforced display-time `Summary length` truncation for tracked-change summaries, including prefixed-summary paths.
- Summary word counting now ignores `↗︎`, `[x]`, and `[ ]` markers.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.10] - 2026-05-12
- Fixed double-tap handler to use first tap coordinates instead of second tap coordinates for consistent gesture recognition.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.9] - 2026-05-11
- Added handling Daily Notes setting Template file location for creating daily notes.
- Fixed refreshing index on changed YAML.
- Updated readme.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.8] - 2026-05-08
- Manual YAML `description` field is now used as-is in summaries — punctuation such as `!`, `?`, `;` is preserved and no markdown flattening is applied.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.7] - 2026-05-08
- Renamed `CHANGELOG.md` to `CHANGELOG` (no extension); updated settings link, release workflow, and production build to match.
- Fixed release workflow to sync `CHANGELOG` to `2brn/Epochgram` on each release.
- Fixed docs site to rewrite `[CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG)` links to the absolute GitHub URL.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.6] - 2026-05-07
- Fixed cross-device index ping-pong between desktop and mobile: preserve `cdate` for binary files, strip runtime-only fields (`indexedMtimeMs`, `indexedSize`, `__pendingTrackedReviewStateClear`) from saved index.
- Added version display to settings.
- Immediate timeline navigation on mobile without scroll animation.
- Updated disable reasons.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description: ## [1.3.5] - 2026-05-05 - Summaries now flatten HTML content (strips tags, decodes entities, removes `

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.4] - 2026-05-04
- Search: added `$marked`, `$hidden`, `$similar` as aliases for the `!marked`, `!hidden`, `!similar` filter tokens.
- Fixed title similarity threshold to respect a configured value of `0` (disabled) without falling back to the built-in default.
- UI: lowercase "disabled" label for title threshold slider in Pro settings.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.3] - 2026-05-04
- Added configurable YAML date property name setting (replaces hardcoded `date`).
- Added configurable YAML description property name setting (replaces hardcoded `description`).
- Respects Daily Notes > Custom format hours/minutes/seconds in daily note file names.
- Date overlay on timeline always displays in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.2] - 2026-05-03
- Prioritized YAML description for epoch generation input over AI/content summaries.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.1] - 2026-05-03
- Fixed stale Pro settings status so license verification updates in-place without reopening Settings.
- Added regression test coverage for startup license validation UI refresh behavior.
- Naming cleanup and consistency updates.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.3.0] - 2026-05-03
- Search: added !hidden directive — shows only hidden records; in Epochs view
  shows only epochs with hidden children (rows rendered muted).
- Search: added !similar directive — shows records from the active file and
  semantically similar files; works correctly in Epochs view.
- Filters: review and parsed filters are now 2-state toggles (Drafts on/off,
  Parsed on/off); state persisted as showDraftsOnly/showParsed.
- Settings: added "Parse dates in properties" toggle (parseDatesInFrontmatter).
- Settings: removed "Simple mode".
- Export Epochs: removed standalone HTML export feature.
- Timeline: cursor switches to hand pointer only after the pointer moves.
- Updated Readme.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.2.2] - 2026-05-01
- Timeline: middle-mouse drag panning, updated cursor.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.2.1] - 2026-05-01
- Timeline: avoid duplicate note-name rendering when summary length is disabled and Show note name is enabled.
- Tooling: migrate Vitest config to ESM and update Vitest/Vite test dependencies.
- Docs: README update.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.2.0] - 2026-05-01
- Filters: Edits and Epochs filter buttons are now hidden when unavailable (Pro inactive, track changes off, or no epoch entries), instead of shown as disabled.
- Menus: Topic context menu item is now hidden entirely when Pro is inactive or topic threshold is disabled, instead of shown as disabled.
- Menus: Summary context menu item is now hidden when summary length is set to 0.
- Timeline: Records with summary length 0 now show filename-only for all record types (including tracked entries), not just anchors.
- Menus: Renamed "Edit summary…" to "Summary…"; removed it from the file explorer context menu.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.14] - 2026-04-30
- Mobile: timeline scroll-to-opened now updates the position immediately when a file is opened, even while the timeline panel is collapsed.
- Readme: minor documentation update.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.13] - 2026-04-30
- Indexer: date-only lines (e.g. `April 04 2026`) now create timeline records instead of being silently dropped.
- Indexer: content-date entries are no longer filtered out when summary length is set to 0; show note name as fallback summary instead.
- Settings: summary length slider double-click reset no longer fires two index-refresh notices.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.12] - 2026-04-30
- Indexer: fix date parsing for compact `YYYYMMDD`, US `Month DD, YYYY`, and `DD-Mon-YY[YY]` formats.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.11] - 2026-04-29
- Timeline/EPOCHS: fix ALT-release restoring hover after Alt+Up/Down and Alt+Wheel.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.10] - 2026-04-28
- Recurring: if no start date use note anchor date.
- File context menu: updated review items to match record context menu.
- Scroll: suppress actions during scroll (desktop and mobile).
- UI: fixed strings to match one format `Epochgram: Details...`.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.9] - 2026-04-25
- Protocol/docs: update obsidian:// handler and BRAT link.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.8] - 2026-04-25
- Fix Drafts filter results count.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.7] - 2026-04-24
- Reviews: automatically move only tracked changes to Draft.
- Reviews: fix preserving Hidden state.
- AI Bridge: hide the AI Bridge button when the server is not started.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.6] - 2026-04-21
- Docs: add GIF previews + README updates.
- Timeline: ctrl-wheel zoom animation; interrupt scroll animation on direction change.
- Pro AI Bridge: tighten security.
- Similarity/Semantics: fix gating + refresh highlights; force semantic refresh on metadata change; update default topics model/list.
- Tests: fix epoch-view test.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.5] - 2026-04-18
- Model-download UX: fewer notices, remove error stack, open Hugging Face externally.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.4] - 2026-04-18
- Timeline: fix anchor drag-and-drop so filename-date notes get renamed to the dropped date (keeps title/filename in sync).
- Epochs/AI summaries: exclude empty daily notes from generation.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.3] - 2026-04-18
- Mobile: fix long-tap switching to epochs.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.2] - 2026-04-17
- Pro defaults: use shared reset constants for first-time similarity threshold and zero-shot minimum score values.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.1] - 2026-04-17
- Timeline: wheel scroll now animates at constant speed instead of easing/exponential falloff.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.1.0] - 2026-04-17
- Timeline: wheel scroll now animates at constant speed (no easing/exponential falloff).
- Timeline: hover is suppressed during wheel pan (matching zoom behavior) and re-engages on pointer move.
- Timeline: increase base row spacing from 90 to 100 for better readability.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.0.9] - 2026-04-17
- UI/Mobile: throttle model downloading progress notices to 10s interval (matching semantics/topics progress notice frequency).

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.0.8] - 2026-04-17
- UI/Mobile: add model downloading progress notices for similarity models on mobile devices (same timeout behavior as semantics/topics processing).
- Search/UX: refine HuggingFace topics model search filter to show more relevant Xenova zero-shot models.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.0.7] - 2026-04-17
- AI queue/epochs: fix cancel race paths that could keep enqueueing work after clearing progress.
- CI/release: set `ONNXRUNTIME_NODE_INSTALL=skip` for workflow installs to avoid optional `onnxruntime-node` NuGet download failures.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.0.4] - 2026-04-16
- Timeline search: add `!marked` to restrict search/filter to marked records (including inherited marks).
- UI: keep the date overlay label updated during mouse-wheel scrolling.
- Docs: update README to reflect `!marked`.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.0.3] - 2026-04-16
- Recurrence: support “every month on -D” month-day rules (end-of-month recurrence).
- Timeline: refresh virtual/pinned items across midnight to prevent day-shifted entries.
- UI: capitalize “Epoch”/“Epochs” across menus and commands.
- AI/Pro: simplify “Generate/Export Epochs” labels and notices.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.0.2] - 2026-04-15
- Similarity/topics: fix processing and update semantics/topics input + defaults.
- AI bridge: remove Node built-ins (`crypto`, `fs`, `path`, `child_process`) and satisfy lint/build constraints.
- UI: limit max width of the record context menu.
- Dev/build: lint rule updates and cleanup.
- Docs: README updates.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.0.1] - 2026-04-12
- Dev/build: clear unused artifacts and add eslint-plugin-obsidianmd.

releases.author: 2brn
releases.description:
## [1.0.0] - 2026-04-11
- First public release.
